Careers

Home » Get Involved » Careers

Employees of the CMHA Cochrane-Timiskaming Branch are valuable members of a multi-disciplinary team which provides important services to individuals in our communities who live with serious mental illness and addictions concerns. 

CMHA-CT’s employment opportunities are posted below.  We also welcome applications for employment even though a vacancy may not exist.  As opportunities arise, we often reach out to qualified applicants to determine their continued availability and interest in employment with us.

CMHA-CT will ensure equality of opportunity for all individuals and will identify and remove artificial or systemic barriers to employment.

If you require accommodations in accordance with the Human Rights Code or the Accessibility for Ontarians With Disabilities Act to support your application for employment at CMHA-CT, please contact our Human Resources Department, and we will be happy to support you.
